completion_summary: Replaced both shared lite execution paths: heat/wait now dynamically use the reference-validated mass-action Arrhenius ReactionNetworkSpec and DynamicBatchReactorModel with solver, conservation, energy, failure, transaction, provenance, and perturbation evidence; central task maturity, reachability, dynamic execution, and security reports were synchronized with no remaining lite providers.
notes: The bounded reaction-network and dynamic-batch runtime slices are reference validated; broader reactor types retain their own explicit evidence boundaries.
scope: Replace shared reaction/reactor lite runtime execution with the validated network, solver, reactor, ledger, diagnostics, provenance, and failure contracts
